Kefeng Road High-Tech Park, Nanshan District, Shenzhen, China. 
 
Company Overview: 
Sunway Communication is a world leading provider of RF connectivity related and other performance-critical 
components and modules. The company involv

candidates.name: Consulting
candidates.raw_resume:
Curriculum Vitae of Gu Shengxing
 I. Basic Information
- Gender: Male
- Age: 44
- Education Background: Master of Business Administration (MBA/EMBA), East China University of Science and 
Technology (Full-time Enrollment, 211 University, Double First-Class University)
- Work Experience: 22 years
- Career Objective: Senior management positions such as Sales Director (auto industry focus)
- Core Advantages: Over 10 years of cross-border operation experience in North America, proficient in end-to-end 
supply chain management, sales leadership, and full-cycle project control; results-oriented with proven cost-saving 
and revenue-generating achievements
II. Work Experience (in Reverse Chronological Order)
(I) BYD North America Corporation (Nov. 2024 - Present, 1 year and 1 month)
- Industry: New Energy Vehicles (one of the world's largest electric vehicle companies, with annual output exceeding 4 
million units and exports to over 100 countries)
- Position: Senior Project Director
- Core Responsibilities:
 1. Responsible for energy storage battery import business, supporting CKD (Completely Knocked Down) battery 
import and assembly at BYD's Lancaster, California factory, and addressing U.S. tariff restrictions and supply chain 
challenges.
 2. Led full-cycle energy storage project management: coordinated factory production, transportation, and EPC 
(Engineering, Procurement, Construction) installation after contract signing; led the team to conduct cold 
commissioning, hot commissioning, connect PCS (Power Conversion System) for charging and discharging, and 
verify the usable capacity of batteries.
 3. Tracked after-sales services post project COD (Commercial Operation Date); led the engineering team to 
conduct on-site troubleshooting and resolve technical issues.
- Key Achievements: Proficient in the entire cross-border supply chain process (procurement, logistics, warehouse 
management), ensuring efficient project advancement and smooth operation amid complex market conditions.
 (II) CIMC Vehicle North America Corporation (Jan. 2021 - Oct. 2024, 3 years and 9 months)
- Industry: Auto Parts and Accessories
- Position: Sales Director (Based in Los Angeles)
- Core Responsibilities:
 1. Responsible for sales management, market maintenance, and development of CIMC Vehicle in the North 
American market (United States + Canada), leading the market breakthrough of container trailers and dry/cold box 
trucks.
 2. Managed a 100-person cross-functional team, including sales, marketing, logistics, warehouse, and customer 
development/management.
 3. Formulated strategic directions, drove the team to achieve revenue and production goals, and took full 
accountability for the company's overall performance.
(III) Haldex - SAF Holland (Oct. 2015 - Jun. 2020, 4 years and 8 months)
- Industry: Auto Parts and Accessories
- Position: Operations Director (Based in the United States)
- Core Responsibilities:
 1. Focused on North American market development; linked with Chinese factories based on customer needs to 
develop brake system components and expand market share.
 2. Oversaw logistics and warehouse management, implementing a T+1 customer delivery model to ensure rapid 
supply chain response; coordinated shipping schedule booking, customs clearance, and drayage of full container 
loads (FCL) from ports to Los Angeles warehouses.
 3. Maintained customer orders, tracked production progress via MRP (Material Requirements Planning) system, 
and managed the North American team to serve dealers, wholesale distributors (WD), and fleet customers.
 4. Built teams, developed strategic development plans, and optimized inter-departmental collaboration efficiency.
 (IV) PACCAR Inc. (Oct. 2007 - Oct. 2015, 8 years)
- Industry: Automobile Manufacturing (Wholly Foreign-Owned Enterprise · Foreign Representative Office)
- Position: Supply Chain Manager (Market Development Department, Based in Shanghai)
- Subordinates: 14 people (including Asia-Pacific supply chain and quality teams)
- Report To: General Manager
- Core Responsibilities:
 1. Responsible for the selection, development, maintenance, and management of outstanding suppliers in the 
Asia-Pacific region (with a focus on China), establishing long-term stable cooperative relationships based on qualified 
quality, optimal overall cost, and stable on-time delivery.
 2. Conducted full-cycle supplier management: RLA (Risk Level Assessment) audit, qualification inspection, 
technical and financial capability evaluation, RFQ (Request for Quotation) and cost analysis, logistics mode 
confirmation; APQP (Advanced Product Quality Planning)/PPAP (Production Part Approval Process) document review, 
product testing, and negotiations on packaging and payment terms; regular factory audits, production process 
supervision, total cost optimization, and delivery schedule control.
 3. Coordinated the entire material import and export process, optimized global material flow solutions, and managed 
the enterprise's ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system for purchased components.
 4. Conducted team building and strategic planning, coordinated inter-departmental relations, and improved overall 
operational efficiency.
- Key Achievements:
 1. Achieved an average of 15% annual cost savings for procurement projects, covering castings, forgings, 
stampings, and injection moldings.
 2. The total procurement volume in China's OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturer) supporting market and 
after-sales market reached 150 million US dollars in 2013.
 3. Continuously improved the quality of purchased items, optimized logistics solutions, and enhanced supply chain 
stability.
III. Key Project Experience
 BYD North America California Energy Storage Battery Project (Nov. 2024 - Present)
- Project Position: Project Manager
- Company: BYD USA
- Project Description: Supported the CKD import and assembly of energy storage batteries at BYD's Lancaster, 
California factory; overcame U.S. tariff restrictions and supply chain challenges, covering end-to-end control from 
procurement and logistics to installation and commissioning.
- Project Responsibilities:
 1. Negotiated contract terms and tracked project milestones.
 2. Coordinated factory shipment, logistics transportation, equipment installation, and commissioning.
 3. Verified battery usable capacity and maintained after-sales services.
 4. Coordinated and tracked payments at each project phase.
- Project Achievements:
 1. Total Project Revenue: 250 Million USD
 2. DDP (Delivered Duty Paid) Landed Cost Saving: 20%
 3. Logistics On-Time Delivery Rate: 100%
 IV. Core Competencies and Advantages
- Cross-border Operation Experience: With over 10 years of in-depth experience in the North American market, 
familiar with market rules, supply chain systems, and customer needs in the United States and Canada; possesses 
practical capabilities in addressing tariff restrictions and cross-border collaboration.
- End-to-End Management Capabilities: Proficient in the entire supply chain process (supplier management, 
procurement, logistics, warehousing, import and export), sales management, and full-cycle project control (from 
contract signing to delivery and after-sales service).
- Team Leadership: Has managed cross-functional teams of various sizes (100 people, 14 people, etc.); skilled in 
team building, strategic planning, performance appraisal, incentive design, and inter-departmental coordination.
- Cost and Result Orientation: Delivered remarkable achievements such as 15% cumulative procurement cost savings 
and 250 million US dollars in project revenue; demonstrates strong awareness of performance achievement and cost 
optimization.
- Wide Industry Adaptability: Covers new energy vehicles, auto parts, and automobile manufacturing; possesses 
comprehensive management capabilities for cross-industry transition.
 V. Education Background
- East China University of Science and Technology | Master of Business Administration (MBA/EMBA) | Sep. 2004 - 
Jun. 2007 | Full-time Enrollment, 211 University, Double First-Class University

candidates.name: Jing Peng
candidates.raw_resume:
Jing Peng 
San Francisco Bay Area; Mobile: (408)772-5012 
Email: jing.j.peng@gmail.com 
EXPERIENCE: 
Wingtech Technology Cupertino, CA 
Senior Account Manager Nov. 2021 – Oct 2023 
• Lead CPFR (collaborative planning, forecasting and replenishment) for all Carriers customers: T-
Mobile, Verizon, Dish, and AT&T. Product lines include REVVL 6, 6 Pro, Tablet, and hotspots. 
• Respond to customer RFQ by collecting information from HQ and NA cross-functional teams. 
• Maintain good relationships with customer to help with HQ requests, including reduce HQ 
inventories during slow-down. 
• Communicate with HQ to meet customer demand during ramp up due to a viral campaign. 
• Streamline payment process of businesses over $100M revenue annually; be the POC for Finance. 
• Monitor and coordinate with HQ cross-functional teams for the entire Order-to-Cash process. 
• Make customer request for formal letters of appreciation to help HQ teams to be recognized to 
further strengthen communications with HQ. 
 
Nexperia Semiconductor Santa Clara, CA 
Sales Operations Analyst and Account Manager Mar. 2021 – Nov. 2021 
• Establish and maintain relationships with OEM customers such as Microsoft and Cisco and 
ensure their demands are fulfilled. 
• Establish and maintain relationships with ODMs such as Foxconn and Pegatron. 
• Ensure supply continuity, review of forecasts and POs, and assist with pull-ins, push-outs. 
 
Northrop Grumman Corporation Sunnyvale, CA 
Financial Analyst Nov. 2019- Mar. 2021 
• Manage the operations of an annual sale of $25M program for a global Aerospace and Defense 
company. Identify and analyze key drivers of variances. 
• Create Macros to identify, develop, implement, and maintain methods to streamline processes, 
eliminate inefficiencies, and improve financial results and accuracy across the operating unit. 
 
AG Microsystems, Inc. Fremont, CA 
Business Operations Manager Jun. 2011 – Apr. 2019 
• Manage the operations of an annual sale of $15M privately held start-up in the Optical 
Networking space, for global telecom companies. Report to the President & CEO. 
• Manage top tier accounts - Molex, Accelink (Wuhan), O’Net (Shenzhen), and Santec (Nagoya). 
• Identify and drive key strategies in manufacturing process to increase efficiency to meet growing 
demand, reduce costs to combat price erosion, and expand business lines. 
• Strengthen strategic partnerships to become single source provider or major supplier. 
EDUCATION: 
Duke University UC Santa Cruz Mission College 
MBA-Fuqua Business School B.A Business Management A.S Engineering 
Durham, North Carolina Santa Cruz, CA Santa Clara, CA 
Jul 2017 - Dec 2018 Sep 2007 - Mar 2011 Aug 2013 - May 2016 
Fluent in Mandarin. US CITIZENrelationships between relevant business partners and g lobal/regio nal Procurement co lleagues by prov iding inpu t and sup port fo r local imple mentation of global and regional initiatives. Collab orate across Procurement to monitor value creation targets, evalua te su pplier performance, imple ment in novative programs and lead regular business sup ported reviews with key sup pliers.

candidates.name: Ma
candidates.raw_resume:
|市场开发|项目管理|产品工程 |可靠性检测|产品设计 |技术中心运营 |供应商管理 |具身智能与 机器人|智能制造 |汽车电子 | 
EXECUTIVE SUMMARY 
Charles Ma 
 Michigan, USA 美国密歇根州
概要 
具有20年领导汽车电子，智能制造与机器人产品的市场开发、产品交付，投资评估，项目管理、产品设计、工程运营等方向的丰富
工作经验。在组建跨文化高绩效团队，开拓新客户，交付新产品和建立运营技术中心方面具有成功的专业经验。是客户开发，技术
投资和产品交付在全球跨职能协作与新兴技术落地领域的领导者。 
 
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE 工作经验 
Humanoid Tech (ENNEW Group Subsidiary) 
Director, Business & Project Management (2022.02–) 总监，市场与项目管理 
• 指导18人市场和项目团队推动人形机器人和特种机器人的产品解决方案在北美工业，物流与能源市场的客户端交付。 
• 制定并执行市场进入策略，年度完成2320万美元的全球项目目标，其中730万美元的项目来自美国客户。 
• 执行中美市场机器人，AI和新能源领域的市场研究、趋势分析与竞争格局评估，以数据驱动的见解支持集团投资策略。 
• 通过项目合作与技术会议寻找高潜力的科技团队，执行技术架构、核心算法和研发能力的初步筛选，以评估商业化潜力与可持
续创新能力，确保与集团的投资发展战略紧密一致。 
• 推动人形机器人和特种机器人在北美市场的交付，为客户提供智能制造、物流和能源安全场景下的智能驱动解决方案与产品。 
• 完成符合UL1740和UL2054标准的产品优化与认证，确保与Stellantis，通用汽车，福特，丰田，现代汽车，英伟达，亚马逊，
苹果，谷歌，DTE，埃克森美孚，BP和壳牌等客户的项目交付。 
• 建立北美合作伙伴和供应链生态，通过与Figure AI，Agility robotics, Diligent Robotics, Robokind, Gotion，ATI和Verta 
AI等合作，实现了28%的成本降低和40%的产品方案迭代速度加快。 
• 合作HomeDepot，Lowes，Menard，BestBuy，Target，Meijer和Walmart等商超渠道，并通过Graybar，Orgill和Aspen等代理公司
合作扩大特种机器人的销售量。 
 
Gentherm Inc. 
Global Director, Electronics Engineering Services (2017.03–2022.02) 总监，电子工程服务 
• 筹建并运营北美技术中心, 完成车规级电子产品的样品制造SMT生产，EMC与可靠性检测和客户侧产品适配交付。 
• 指导全球50多名工程师为通用、福特、丰田、特斯拉、日产以及安道拓、李尔、佛吉亚、LG化学、AESC、松下能源和三星SDI
等客户完成车规级电子控制器/电路板，BMS，车载空调和航空座椅温度控制等产品的交付，设计，制造与质量测试。 
• 使用Confluence，Jira和 Windchill等技术管理平台，完成设计文件审查、设计问题识别、适用的法规标准研究和解决方案
全球化，从而将产品交付风险控制降低了9%的失效发生率。 
• 与顶尖大学实验室建立技术合作伙伴关系，推动智能客舱、BMS和自动驾驶技术的联合开发。 
Test Lab Manager (2010.06–2017.03) 实验室经理 
• 初创两家通过ISO17025认证的汽车电子实验室，在8个月内获得A2LA认证。 
• 领导超过16名工程师为全球汽车制造商提供电子控制器和执行器产品的环境，EMC和声学测试。 
• 开发并使用V-Loop测试自动检测流程，将实验室年度任务完成量提高77%。 
• 为通用、福特、丰田、现代、大众、宝马和尼桑等全球汽车制造厂交付车规级控制器和执行器。 
Project Manager, Advanced Electronics (2008.12–2010.06) 项目经理，先进电子产品 
• 管理整个APQP周期以及柴油加热模块和电动汽车电池BMS项目的客户交付。 
• 使用核心质量工具（DFMEA， PFMEA，控制计划，MSA， SPC）成功交付项目。 
 
Fujitsu Ten (DENSO Group Subsidiary) 富士通天（电装集团） 
Design Engineer (2006.07–2008.12) 
• 主导通用汽车10MY/11MY汽车音响系统硬件电路板设计开发。 
• 在全球模块化电子平台上与日本，美国和中国的研发中心合作。 
• 4层PCB板原理图与电路板图设计，按时完成EMC和产品可靠性验证。 
• 进行产品FMEA拆解分析，确保设计符合APQP、TS16949、QS9000标准。 
 
EDUCATION 教育 
Master of Software Engineering 软件工程 University of Michigan 密歇根大学 2024.06 
MBA, Master of Business Administration 工商管理硕士 Tianjin University 天津大学 2011.06 
EE, Automation Engineering 自动化 Tianjin University 天津大学 2006.07 
 
CERTIFICATIONS 证书 
IATF16949 Internal Assessor,内审员 SIX SIGMA® BlackBelt, 六西格玛黑带 PMP® Project Manager,项目管理 
ISO17025 Assessor of A2LA,审核员 iNARTE® EMC Engineer, 电磁兼容 IPC® 600/610/650 电路板可靠性设计 
 
上海试试管理咨询有限公司 招聘专用
上海试试管理咨询有限公司 招聘专用
上海试试管理咨询有限公司 招聘专用

candidates.name: 郭萌
candidates.raw_resume:
郭萌 
在职，看看新机会 
女 42 岁 天津-南开区 本科 工作 19 年 
工作经历 
AEW 汽车美国分公司 （2021.08 - 至今, 4 年 4 个月） 销售经理 & 项目经理 
职责业绩： 
美国分公司: Key account manager & Project manager（2021.8－2022.8 & 2024.6-至
今 ） 
目前报价阶段共 45 个项目，其中新项目定点率 80%，定点后跟进共 28 个新项目涉及
120 个产品编码 新项目跟进中共计 15 个项目涉及 90 个产品品类 
1. 对接美国通用,福特和 Tesla 北美公司，开拓新客户和原有客户的新项目，维护客户
关系 
2. 组织 RFQ 前期评估会议，并作为窗口与客户进行沟通 
3. 跟进新项目询价和定点 
4. 核算新项目成本，输出报价 
5. 建立北美汽车电子实验室及内部规划落实，熟悉 ISO/IEC 17025 实验室体系文件及
认证要求 
6. 协调解决新项目和量产项目在客户端的全部问题，包括价格，样件，质量和物流问
题 
7. 跟踪客户回款落实 
8. 担任北美通用和北美福特（新能源车型）的新项目项目经理职责，项目经历如下： 
通用项目： （BT1，C1Y，D2U） 
主要福特对特客户北美工程团队，协调客户输入与国内资源的匹配，制定整个项目计
划和各个项目里程杯交付产品，控制项目时间节点和项目成本，落实海外工厂试产物
料，人员，设备，工装治具及客户特殊要求的满足。主导整个项目过程中的正常跟进
和问题处理，总结间题清单完成项目文件 OTS, PPAP 输出以及 PSW 的确认签核。 
福特项目： （P736，P833，P800，U625，U725） 
对接福特加州新能源团队客户，组织内部项目团队对新项目进行初期技术风险评估。
组织项目定点会，例会，项目阶段会议，突发问题解决会。制定整体项目计划，确认
项目生产工厂，项目团队成员分工，原型样件海外工厂物料准备和海外工厂模治具协
调。负责跟进海外工厂项目小批量试产。 
中国天津总部：Project Manager（2022/08－2024/06） 
主要负责比亚迪主机厂的座椅项目，主要负责比亚迪仰望 U8 和 U9 系列座椅的气动腰
托按摩系统，座椅通风系统，座椅加热系统和 SBR 产品 
1.组建项目团队，建立新项目立项文档 
2.负责新项目报价，维护项目报价系统 
3.组织项目定点会，技术评估会，周会，例会，项目阶段会议，突发问题解决会 
4.对接客户，组织项目团队对新项目进行初期技术风险评估 
5.项目计划，时间节点制定和管控 
6.熟悉 APQP 流程，平衡客户输入和公司资源调配项目阶段输出 
7.监控项目执行进度，处理各种临时变更，ECR 和紧急需求 
8.跟进新项目各阶段试产，落实试产的物料，人员，设备，工装治具，及客户特殊要求 
9.主导整个项目过程中的正常跟进和问题处理，总结间题清单完成项目文件 OTS, 
PPAP 输出 
10.新项目移交后，拉动厂内设备，物料，文件，人员资源，确保顺利量产 
11.项目的跟进过程挖掘客户其他新项目的潜在合作机会 
吉尔玛北美顾问有限公司 （2020.01 - 2022.08, 2 年 7 个月） 咨询服务（法人） 
职责业绩： 
1. 协助国内企业落户美国，办理在美公司注册，实验室和仓库选址规划，人员招聘，
设备采购等相关手续。 
2. 代理植物生长灯在北美市场线下销售及展会推广。 
3. 代理汽车零部件公司海外项目客户维护和销售管理。 
TTE 电子北美分公司 （2018.08 - 2021.06, 2 年 10 个月） 项目销售工程师 
职责业绩： 
• 对应客户新项目审核并确保满足客户全部审核要求。 
• 提供项目报价和报价分解报告。 
• 使用 EDI 系统接收并跟踪新项目的采购订单。 
• 为北美和南美地区客户派送样品和准备项目文件，并跟踪维护客户系统中样品的物
流信息。 
• 与财务部门合作管理新项目成本。 
• 支持并协调解决客户新项目中出现的紧急事务。 
比亚迪电子（惠州）有限公司 （2013.09 - 2017.02, 3 年 5 个月） 项目经理 
职责业绩： 
• 领导新项目风险评估和客户产品数据评估。 
• 准备项目文件包括申请 BOM、审核产品制造计划和产品技术文件。 
• 验证评估新物料和新设备需求，并协调物料样品和设备采购。 
• 遵循 IATF16949 并依照 APQP 流程管理新项目开发流程。设定项目时间表，关键里
程碑和试产计划。 
• 领导新项目试产，完成人员协调、协调各部门开展试产，并确保试产文件包含全部
客户要求。 
• 评估客户设计变更和质量升级要求，组织团队成员制定应对方案并实施完成。 建立
SMT 车间项目经验 
• 全面领导新车间投产前的内部审核和客户审核工作。 
• 领导 SMT 新车间的规划、设计、和搭建，并使用 SWOT 法评估设备有效性和优劣
势。 
• 组织安排相关设备操作培训和汽车行业管理培训，如：环保，安全，仓库，静电管
理等。 
• 组织制定设备使用指导书。 
捷温汽车系统(中国)有限公司（2009.08 - 2012.09, 3 年 1 个月）销售管理、进出口专
